title: Docker vs Kubernetes: What's the Difference?
description: Docker and Kubernetes are not competitors — they solve different problems. Learn what each tool actually does, how they work together, and when to use both.
excerpt: Most people assume Docker and Kubernetes are rivals and you pick one or the other. The reality is more useful: they operate at entirely different layers, and the most common production stack uses both.

title: Hiragana vs Katakana: What's the Difference?
description: Hiragana and katakana represent the same 46 sounds but serve completely different roles. Learn the difference, when each is used, and which to learn first.
excerpt: Hiragana and katakana both encode the same sounds, yet every piece of real Japanese text uses both for different jobs. This post explains what each script is, when each is used, how they look different, and why you need both.
